_comment: Konfigurasi Lucky Get combo reward — edit file ini untuk ubah reward/rate tanpa sentuh kode.

price10._comment: Gift harga 10 coin — milestone 100× → 200× berulang (fase 0 → fase 1 → fase 0 ...)

price100._comment: Gift harga 100 coin — milestone 500× per siklus acak. Hanya aktif jika room sudah > roomThreshold coin.

dropsByCombo._comment: Berapa kali reward turun per trigger, berdasarkan combo (qty)

otherPrices._comment: Gift harga selain 10 dan 100 — rate acak per tap

ratesByCombo._comment: Probabilitas drop per tap, berdasarkan combo (qty)
